ayahs.translation: A supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen[1748]
To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer.
[It is] from Allāh, owner of the ways of ascent.

ayahs.arabic: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
ayahs.transliteration: TaAAruju almala-ikatu warroohuilayhi fee yawmin kana miqdaruhu khamseena alfasana
ayahs.translation: The angels and the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years.
So be patient with gracious patience.
Indeed, they see it [as] distant,
But We see it [as] near.
On the Day the sky will be like murky oil,[1749]
And the mountains will be like wool,[1750]
And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend,

ayahs.arabic: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yubassaroonahum yawaddu almujrimu lawyaftadee min AAathabi yawmi-ithin bibaneeh
ayahs.translation: They will be shown each other. The criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that Day by his children
And his wife and his brother
And his nearest kindred who shelter him

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
ayahs.translation: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him.
No![1751] Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],
A remover of exteriors.[1752]
It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]
And collected [wealth] and hoarded.
Indeed, mankind was created anxious:
When evil touches him, impatient,
And when good touches him, withholding [of it],
Except the observers of prayer -
Those who are constant in their prayer
And those within whose wealth is a known right[1753]
For the petitioner and the deprived -
And those who believe in the Day of Recompense

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
ayahs.translation: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord -
Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe -
And those who guard their private parts

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa AAala azwajihim awma malakat aymanuhum fa-innahum ghayru maloomeen
ayahs.translation: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess,[1754] for indeed, they are not to be blamed -

ayahs.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Famani ibtagha waraa thalikafaola-ika humu alAAadoon
ayahs.translation: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors -
And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive
And those who are in their testimonies upright
And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:
They will be in gardens,[1755] honored.
So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muḥammad],
[To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups?[1756]

ayahs.arabic: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: AyatmaAAu kullu imri-in minhum anyudkhala jannata naAAeem
ayahs.translation: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?
No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know.[1757]

ayahs.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fala oqsimu birabbi almashariqiwalmagharibi inna laqadiroon
ayahs.translation: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings[1758] that indeed We are able

ayahs.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: AAala an nubaddila khayran minhum wamanahnu bimasbooqeen
ayahs.translation: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone.

ayahs.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatharhum yakhoodoowayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allatheeyooAAadoon
ayahs.translation: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yakhrujoona mina al-ajdathi siraAAankaannahum ila nusubin yoofidoon
ayahs.translation: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening.[1759]

ayahs.arabic: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: KhashiAAatan absaruhumtarhaquhum thillatun thalika alyawmu allatheekanoo yooAAadoon
ayahs.translation: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised.
